sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82244" key="periste/rnion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιστέρν-ιον</orth>, glossed by <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περιστερνίδιον</foreign> (prob. a <sense id="n82244.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">breast-band</tr_>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
